tasks.subject: Task 1: S3ArtifactStore + deps + invariant patterns + adapters wire + 17 tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship S3ArtifactStore end-to-end. Land both pixi deps (boto3 + google-cloud-storage) and both new _VENDOR_PATTERNS entries in this task so the floor is laid for Task 2's GCS work without a separate infrastructure-only commit.

**Files:**
- Create: src/kinoforge/stores/s3/__init__.py
- Modify: src/kinoforge/_adapters.py
- Modify: pixi.toml
- Modify: tests/test_core_invariant.py
- Create: tests/stores/conftest.py
- Create: tests/stores/test_s3.py

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/stores/test_s3.py tests/test_core_invariant.py -v && pixi run test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/stores/s3/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/_adapters.py", "pixi.toml", "tests/test_core_invariant.py", "tests/stores/conftest.py", "tests/stores/test_s3.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/stores/test_s3.py tests/test_core_invariant.py -v && pixi run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["S3ArtifactStore implements 7-method ABC", "uri_for matches put_bytes/put_json artifact uri", "lazy boto3 import gate verified", "self-registers under s3", "pixi adds boto3 + google-cloud-storage", "_VENDOR_PATTERNS extended for both SDKs", "_adapters.py imports kinoforge.stores.s3", "17 S3 tests pass, full suite green, coverage >= 90%"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: GCSArtifactStore + adapters wire + 17 tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mirror Task 1 for GCS. Same 17-test surface, gs:// scheme, GCS-specific SDK shape.

**Files:**
- Create: src/kinoforge/stores/gcs/__init__.py
- Modify: src/kinoforge/_adapters.py
- Create: tests/stores/test_gcs.py

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/stores/test_gcs.py tests/test_core_invariant.py -v && pixi run test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/stores/gcs/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/_adapters.py", "tests/stores/test_gcs.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/stores/test_gcs.py tests/test_core_invariant.py -v && pixi run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GCSArtifactStore implements 7-method ABC", "uri_for matches put_bytes/put_json artifact uri (gs:// scheme)", "dual lazy SDK import gate verified", "self-registers under gcs", "_adapters.py imports kinoforge.stores.gcs", "17 GCS tests pass, full suite green, coverage >= 90%"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: StoreConfig pydantic block + 6 tests + YAML example
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the optional store: config block users will eventually fill to switch CLI from LocalArtifactStore to S3 or GCS. Pure schema work.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/config.py
- Modify: tests/core/test_config.py
- Modify: examples/configs/wan.yaml

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/core/test_config.py -v && pixi run test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py", "examples/configs/wan.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_config.py -v && pixi run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["StoreConfig schema with kind/root/bucket/prefix", "model_validator enforces kind <-> bucket invariants", "Config.store default_factory preserves backwards compat", "6 tests pass, full suite green, coverage >= 90%", "wan.yaml documents store: block"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: CLI _build_store + 3 call-site swaps + 3 tests + Layer-A _path peek fix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the new StoreConfig into the CLI so end-users can switch stores via YAML. Backwards-compatible: absent store: block -> LocalArtifactStore(state_dir). Same task fixes the Layer-A leftover store._path peek at cli.py:441.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/cli.py
- Modify: tests/test_cli.py

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/test_cli.py -v && pixi run test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli.py", "tests/test_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_cli.py -v && pixi run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_build_store helper handles all 3 store kinds with lazy SDK imports", "2 call sites swapped (generate + gc)", "cli.py:441 _path peek replaced with uri_for", "_ledger unchanged (ledger stays local)", "3 new tests pass + 8 existing CLI tests preserved", "coverage >= 90%"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: README + PROGRESS docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per project CLAUDE.md durability rules - keep README's Roadmap honest and update the recovery index.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md
- Modify: PROGRESS.md

**Verify:** git diff README.md PROGRESS.md && pixi run pre-commit run --files README.md PROGRESS.md

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "git diff README.md PROGRESS.md && pixi run pre-commit run --files README.md PROGRESS.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README Roadmap drops S3/GCS line", "README Extending lists 3 stores", "PROGRESS Phase 13 subsection with 4 task SHAs", "PROGRESS Single next action repointed", "pre-commit green"]}
```
